mapper.sql: id ,internet_mno_id ,prod_name ,combination_name ,prod_descript ,tv_prod_name ,channel_count ,internet_speed ,GET_CODE_NAME('internet_speed', internet_speed) AS internetSpeedName ,combination_price ,combination_freeble_price ,use_yn ,order_no ,create_date ,create_id ,GET_ADMIN_USER_NM(create_id) as createNm ,modified_date ,modified_id ,GET_ADMIN_USER_NM(modified_id) as modifiedNm
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM tb_pmb_internet_plan_list_new
ORDER BY order_no
SELECT id ,name ,mno_logo ,manager ,use_yn ,alam_rcv_num FROM tb_pmb_internet_mno WHERE id = #{id}
